name: freellama-website
description: Documentation website for freellama — run LLMs locally, powered by llama.cpp.

scripts.cf-typegen: node node_modules/.bin/wrangler types && node node_modules/.bin/react-router typegen
scripts.check: node node_modules/.bin/tsc && node node_modules/.bin/react-router build && node node_modules/.bin/wrangler deploy --dry-run
scripts.typecheck: node node_modules/.bin/wrangler types && node node_modules/.bin/react-router typegen && node node_modules/.bin/tsc -b
